blocks.text:
Nipah→West Bengal (I overbet Kerala 0.70!) = -35.7; Iran province→Isfahan (overbet Baluchestan 0.40) = -20.6; but Thailand PM→Natthaphong (0.33)=+45.5. TW: **478.95**. 

Key recalibration: reserve high confidence (0.6+) for STRUCTURALLY dominant answers (Board of Peace); use 0.35-0.50 for "likely but event could be elsewhere" (Nipah/Oreshnik/Iran province). Let me advance toward the AO draw.
